content:
UID: 100804972

Guide on how to get the highest PPS for the 200 posse event.
The idea is to regen 2k skey every turn via end turn button. 
I chose the shield posse instead of gate posse which regens 200 skey because gate posse is slow (requires selecting another posse) and only counts as one posse.
Here's a checklist of things you need
- arc2 rule set (d zone low alert) 
- pure chaos realm for keyflare <:realm_chaos:1437283650809888768> 
- awakers with keyflare stat built in
- dust and dawn wheel
- life drain covenant 
- thais wheel
- covenant with keyflare substat
- the best keyflare wheels you have
- don't exalt / play card, just posse and end turn

# Warning
At turn 99, enemy will use The End and kill you instantly thus not counting your posse uses. So avoid turn 99.
“We all love Aurora!”, we say in union.
Aurora's pps is so much bigger <:Sendflowers:1400771545370067118>

Hmm can be optimized maybe.
Ramona 3 cost has aftershock which generates skey so if you put dream medication on her, you'll gain more passive skey.
However, that's rng. Also ramona has the highest base skey stat in game due to talent. Which is why I had her hold both thais wheel and life drain.

This is mostly both to help newer players to the game as well as for my own enjoyment looking back on how Arc 1/Forgotten Pages has gotten to this point. Please remember that this is a Tier List that only considers Arc 1.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y-c1iF-OeDM
